title: Subtle Variants
description: Enhances the vanilla look and feel with random and unbostrusive texture variations
body:
Subtle Variants is texture pack designed to enhance the vanilla look and feel by providing a few random and unbostrusive texture variations to the most common blocks.


Works with vanilla minecraft, does not require Optifine.

This resource pack is a work in progress and is gradually evolving through incremental updates, with frequent releases introducing fresh block variants on a regular basis. Be sure to come back and check for new versions.


<details>
<summary>List of blocks with variants</summary>

- Acacia planks
- Birch planks
- Bookshelf
- Bricks
- Cherry planks
- Coal ore
- Cobblestone
- Copper ore
- Dark oak planks
- Deepslate bricks
- Deepslate tiles
- Deepslate
- Diamond ore
- Dirt
- Emerald ore
- Gold ore
- Grass
- Iron ore
- Jungle planks
- Lapis ore
- Mangrove planks
- Netherrack
- Oak planks
- Redstone ore
- Spruce planks
- Stone bricks

</details>
